title: Cooperation; other agencies
doc_html:
§1228.8.  Cooperation; other agencies

All departments, commissions, boards, agencies, and officers of the state, or any political subdivision thereof, are authorized and directed to cooperate with the policy board in implementing these provisions.

Acts 1999, No. 864, §1.
